ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, forex, cryptocurrency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique identifier or symbol for the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the financial instrument is denominated */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector or industry of the financial instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the financial instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* The CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures) number for the financial instrument */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* The SEDOL (Stock Exchange Daily Official List) number for the financial instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last date and time the financial instrument's details were updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the financial instrument (e.g., active, suspended, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument */,
  "last" REAL /* Last price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the financial instrument traded */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total value of trades (volume * average price) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the data was obtained */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* The timeframe of the data (e.g., 1-minute, 5-minute, daily) */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* The number of open contracts or positions */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* The highest price a buyer is willing to pay */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* The lowest price a seller is willing to accept */,
  "bid_size" INTEGER /* The total quantity being bid at the bid price */,
  "ask_size" INTEGER /* The total quantity being offered at the ask price */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing the user's permissions */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  "details" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
